summary: PR #2544 made the stage function grCastle_801CDFD8 in src/melee/gr/grcastle.c match by simplifying temporary variables, using direct grCs_804D6970 field accesses, narrowing random_range to range, and assigning literal sentinel values directly. The PR body claims improvement from 99.84% to 100%, and the bot report records one new match for main/melee/gr/grcastle: grCastle_801CDFD8.

key_files.role: Only changed file; cleanup of grCastle_801CDFD8 local variables and assignments to achieve a match.
evidence_refs: changed_files: src/melee/gr/grcastle.c added 9 deleted 23 hunks 1
raw_diff: grCastle_801CDFD8 hunk
human_pr_text: 'Minor cleanup that takes this function from a 99.84% match to 100%.'
text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report shows grCastle_801CDFD8 Before 99.84% After 100.00%

what_changed.text: Removed several single-use locals in grCastle_801CDFD8, including params, params2, neg_one, zero, base_value, and final_value.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removed grCastleParams* params/params2 and scalar temporary declarations

what_changed.text: Renamed random_range to range and used it directly for the HSD_Randi argument after loading grCs_804D6970->xA.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: random_range replaced by range; HSD_Randi(random_range) replaced by HSD_Randi(range)

what_changed.text: Assigned gp->gv.castle9.xD4 from grCs_804D6970->x8 + rand_result directly instead of storing base_value and final_value temporaries.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gp->gv.castle9.xD4 = grCs_804D6970->x8 + rand_result

what_changed.text: Assigned -1 and 0 literals directly to castle9 short fields xDC, xDA, xD8, and xD6 instead of routing through neg_one and zero locals.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gp->gv.castle9.xDC/xDA/xD8 = -1 and xD6 = 0

smart_moves.text: Reduced decompiler-shaped temporary churn while preserving typed GroundVars field accesses such as gp->gv.castle9.xDE_b0 and xD4/xD6/xD8/xDA/xDC.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: cleanup keeps gp->gv.castle9 field assignments

smart_moves.text: Kept the random-range guard explicit: if grCs_804D6970->xA is nonzero, call HSD_Randi(range), otherwise use 0.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: range guard around HSD_Randi

decomp_lessons.lesson: For small stage-function matches, removing single-use temporaries and assigning simple constants or computed expressions directly can be the matching shape, especially when the PR evidence shows the change moved a function from a near-match to 100%.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removed single-use locals and direct assignments added
human_pr_text: 99.84% to 100%
text_corpus: bot report grCastle_801CDFD8 Before 99.84% After 100.00%

decomp_lessons.lesson: Prefer preserving recovered typed stage/GroundVars field accesses over reintroducing raw offset work when cleaning up a matching function.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: cleanup uses GET_GROUND(gobj) and gp->gv.castle9 fields throughout
decomp_standards: typed-fields-over-pointer-math

naming_conventions.name: range
naming_conventions.convention: Short role-based local name replaced random_range for the HSD_Randi bound loaded from grCs_804D6970->xA.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: s32 random_range changed to s32 range

naming_conventions.name: gp
naming_conventions.convention: Ground pointer local name retained for GET_GROUND(gobj).
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Ground* gp = GET_GROUND(gobj)

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Eliminate redundant locals and use direct field/literal assignments to alter codegen for a final small match delta.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: deleted params/params2/neg_one/zero/base_value/final_value temporaries
text_corpus: bot report records one new match for grCastle_801CDFD8

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use a single loaded range local for both the nonzero test and HSD_Randi call.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: range = grCs_804D6970->xA; if (range != 0) HSD_Randi(range)

accepted_candidate_records.title: Single-use local removal can close near-match stage functions
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2544, grCastle_801CDFD8 reached a reported 100.00% match after replacing several single-use locals with direct grCs_804D6970 field accesses and direct literal assignments to gp->gv.castle9 fields.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCastle_801CDFD8 cleanup
human_pr_text: 99.84% to 100%
text_corpus: bot report one new match

rejection_notes: Do not generalize this PR into a rule that direct global field access is always better than keeping pointer locals; the evidence only shows this shape matched grCastle_801CDFD8.
Do not infer reviewer intent or manual approval details; no review comments or reviews are present in the loaded slice.
Do not treat the bot report as full adjacent-regression evidence; it only reports the PR-level match summary included in the slice.
